story.iWant: the enhanced plan.yaml schema to include all agenda and discovery data
story.soThat: slide generation can use the rich context gathered during planning

tasks.task: Update plan.yaml save in Step 3 - Modify slide generation to use agenda_sections as input, add agenda_section_id to each slide
Update plan.yaml save in Step 5 - Ensure agenda section is written with full schema including discovery object
Update build-one to use section context - Read plan.yaml, find agenda section matching slide's agenda_section_id, pass visual_treatment and content_types
Update CONVENTIONS.md - Document AskUserQuestion patterns, agenda structure schema, discovery object schema
Add lighter discovery to plan-one - Add optional discovery step after intent confirmation

criterion.title: Enhanced plan.yaml Schema
criterion.then: it includes: agenda section with total_sections and sections array; each section contains id, title, narrative_role, estimated_slides, description; each section contains discovery object with key_message, key_message_framing, content_types, visual_treatment, research_findings

criterion.title: Slide Generation Context
criterion.given: plan.yaml contains agenda and discovery data
criterion.then: slide is linked to its agenda_section_id; visual guidance is derived from section.discovery.visual_treatment; content types inform content suggestions; key message informs slide messaging

criterion.title: CONVENTIONS.md Update
criterion.given: the enhanced planning patterns are implemented
criterion.then: it documents: AskUserQuestion tool usage patterns; agenda structure schema; discovery object schema; how slide generation uses section context

criterion.title: plan-one Lighter Discovery
criterion.then: optional lighter discovery is available (message options only); discovery data stored in same format as plan-deck; can skip discovery entirely for quick single slides

doc.title: Enhanced Planning Sessions - Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Defines the complete schema with agenda structure, discovery object containing key_message, content_types, visual_treatment, and research_findings. Shows slide-to-section linking via agenda_section_id.

doc.title: Slide Builder - Architecture
doc.snippet: Documents existing plan.yaml structure with deck metadata, audience context, storyline, and slides array. Shows key_points, visual_guidance, tone per slide - foundation for discovery integration.

doc.title: Epics & Stories
doc.snippet: Story 13.4 definition: Schema & Integration - Update plan.yaml schema with agenda and discovery data. Modify slide generation to use section context.

file.reason: Contains agenda proposal logic and AskUserQuestion integration. Sections stored in {{agenda_sections}} array with id, title, narrative_role, estimated_slides, description.
file.currentState: Agenda sections confirmed and stored but discovery object not yet persisted to plan.yaml

file.reason: Contains discovery data collection. Currently captures: key_message (required), diagram_requirements (optional), visual_metaphor (optional), research_findings (optional). Uses streamlined single multi-select to choose which discovery areas to explore.
file.currentState: Discovery data stored in section.discovery object but NOT persisted to plan.yaml yet. This is the primary integration point.
file.note: Discovery fields: key_message (string), diagram_requirements (array|null), visual_metaphor (array|null), research_findings (array)

file.reason: TASK 1 TARGET: Currently generates slides array WITHOUT agenda_section_id. Need to modify to use agenda_sections as input and link slides to sections.
file.currentState: Generates storyline and slides array but does not link slides to agenda sections

file.reason: TASK 2 TARGET: Currently saves plan.yaml WITHOUT agenda section. Need to add agenda with full schema including discovery objects.
file.currentState: Writes deck metadata, audience context, storyline, and slides array - but missing agenda section entirely
file.note: The YAML template at lines 1192-1239 needs to be extended with agenda section

file.reason: TASK 3 TARGET: Currently extracts slide context but does NOT read agenda_section_id or discovery data. Need to add step to load section context.
file.currentState: Extracts number, intent, template, key_points, visual_guidance, tone, storyline_role - but not agenda_section_id

file.reason: TASK 3 TARGET: Content generation step that should use discovery data for visual guidance and content suggestions.
file.currentState: Uses plan fields (intent, key_points, visual_guidance, tone) but not discovery data

file.reason: TASK 5 TARGET: Add optional discovery step after confirmation. Currently goes directly from confirmation to save.
file.currentState: After user confirms intent, proceeds directly to Phase 5 (save). No discovery opportunity.

file.reason: TASK 5 TARGET: plan.yaml schema needs to support discovery data if user engages with optional discovery.
file.currentState: Saves intent, suggested_template, key_points - no discovery fields in schema

file.reason: TASK 4 TARGET: Currently documents workflow patterns, file structure, state management, and catalog system. Missing: AskUserQuestion patterns, agenda schema, discovery schema, section context usage.
file.currentState: 173 lines covering commands, workflow execution, file structure, state management, catalog system

constraints.constraint: AskUserQuestion tool limited to 4 questions max, 4 options per question max
AskUserQuestion always provides "Other" option for custom input
plan.yaml stored in output/{deck-slug}/plan.yaml for deck mode
Slides reference agenda sections via agenda_section_id
Step 2.6 captures discovery data - need to persist it in Step 5
Step 3 generates slides - need to link to agenda sections
build-one extracts slide context - need to also extract section context

interface.name: AskUserQuestion Tool
interface.signature: {questions: [{question: string, header: string (max 12 chars), options: [{label: string, description: string}], multiSelect: boolean}]}

interface.name: plan.yaml Schema (Current)
interface.signature: deck_name, audience, purpose, storyline, recurring_themes, slides[]

interface.name: plan.yaml Schema (Target)
interface.signature: deck_name, audience, purpose, agenda: {total_sections, sections[{id, title, narrative_role, estimated_slides, description, discovery}]}, storyline, slides[{...existing, agenda_section_id}]

interface.name: discovery Object (Current in Memory)
interface.signature: {key_message: string, diagram_requirements: array|null, visual_metaphor: array|null, research_findings: array}

interface.name: discovery Object (Target in YAML)
interface.signature: {key_message, key_message_framing, content_types[], visual_treatment: {diagram_type[], visual_metaphor[], imagery_theme[]}, research_findings[]}

task.title: Update Step 3 to use agenda_sections

changes.change: Modify slide generation to iterate over agenda_sections instead of generating independently
For each agenda section, generate estimated_slides number of slides
Add agenda_section_id to each generated slide linking to parent section
Derive storyline from sections with narrative_role (opening->opening_hook, problem->tension, solution->resolution, cta->call_to_action)

task.example: ```xml <action>Generate slide breakdown from agenda_sections: For each section in agenda_sections: Generate {{section.estimated_slides}} slides where each slide has: - number: Sequential (continuing from previous section) - intent: Derived from section.description + section.discovery.key_message - template: Match using catalog - agenda_section_id: "{{section.id}}" - storyline_role: Map from section.narrative_role - visual_guidance: From section.discovery.visual_metaphor or section.discovery.diagram_requirements - key_points: Extract from section context </action> ```

task.title: Update Step 5 to save agenda with discovery

changes.change: Add agenda section to plan.yaml template
Include full discovery object for each section
Ensure slides array includes agenda_section_id for each slide

task.title: Update build-one to use section context

changes.change: Add step to read agenda_section_id from current slide
Find matching section in plan.yaml.agenda.sections
Extract discovery data for use in slide generation
Pass visual_treatment to inform visual guidance
Pass key_message to inform slide messaging

task.example:
```markdown ### Phase 1A.5: Load Section Context (if available)
<steps> 1. Check if slide has `agenda_section_id` field 2. If present, find matching section in `agenda.sections` array 3. Extract section discovery data: - `key_message`: Core message for this section's slides - `diagram_requirements`: Preferred diagram styles - `visual_metaphor`: Visual themes to incorporate - `research_findings`: Supporting data to reference 4. Enhance slide context with section data: - Override or supplement `visual_guidance` with discovery info - Use `key_message` to inform title/content generation </steps> ```

task.title: Update CONVENTIONS.md

changes.change: Add "Enhanced Planning Patterns" section
Document AskUserQuestion tool usage with examples
Document agenda structure schema
Document discovery object schema
Document how build workflows use section context

task.example:
```markdown ## Enhanced Planning Patterns
### AskUserQuestion Tool Usage
The AskUserQuestion tool enables structured user input during planning workflows.
**Constraints:** - Maximum 4 questions per call - Maximum 4 options per question - User can always select "Other" for custom input - Use `multiSelect: true` for selections where multiple apply - Use `multiSelect: false` for single-choice decisions
**Example (single-select):** ```json { "questions": [{ "question": "Which message framing resonates best?", "header": "Message", "options": [ {"label": "Direct", "description": "Statement about audience's situation"}, {"label": "Question", "description": "Engage with a thought-provoking question"}, {"label": "Story", "description": "Open with a relatable scenario"}, {"label": "Data", "description": "Lead with a surprising statistic"} ], "multiSelect": false }] } ```
### Agenda Structure Schema
After context collection, the planning workflow generates an agenda structure stored in plan.yaml:
```yaml agenda: total_sections: 5 sections: - id: "agenda-1" title: "Opening Hook" narrative_role: "opening" estimated_slides: 1 description: "Grab attention with key insight" discovery: key_message: "..." # ... discovery fields ```
### Discovery Object Schema
Each agenda section includes a discovery object:
```yaml discovery: key_message: "The main message for this section" key_message_framing: "direct | question | story | data" diagram_requirements: - "Flowchart" - "Timeline" visual_metaphor: - "Journey" - "Growth" research_findings: - source: "https://..." content: "Supporting statistic or quote" selected: true ```
### Slide Generation Integration
When building slides, the build-one workflow: 1. Reads `agenda_section_id` from the slide plan 2. Finds matching section in `agenda.sections` 3. Uses discovery data to enhance generation: - `key_message` informs slide title/messaging - `diagram_requirements` guides layout choice - `visual_metaphor` influences imagery - `research_findings` provides content to include ```

task.title: Add optional discovery to plan-one

changes.change: Add optional Phase 4.5 for quick discovery
Offer single AskUserQuestion for message framing
Allow user to skip for quick planning
Update Phase 5 schema to include discovery if provided

task.example:
```xml <!-- PHASE 4.5: Optional Quick Discovery --> <step n="4.5" goal="Optional message discovery"> <ask> Would you like to refine the message approach? (Optional - speeds up generation)
**[y]es** - Choose a message framing style **[n]o** - Skip and proceed to build </ask>
<check if="user chooses yes"> <action>Use AskUserQuestion to present framing options: { "questions": [{ "question": "What message approach works best?", "header": "Message", "options": [ {"label": "Direct", "description": "Clear statement of value"}, {"label": "Question", "description": "Engage with inquiry"}, {"label": "Story", "description": "Narrative approach"}, {"label": "Data", "description": "Lead with evidence"} ], "multiSelect": false }] } </action> <action>Store selection in {{discovery.key_message_framing}}</action> </check>
<check if="user chooses no"> <action>Set {{discovery}} = null</action> </check> </step> ```

tests.standards: No automated testing framework. Manual testing via workflow execution and plan.yaml inspection.

locations.location: Manual: Run /sb:plan-deck, complete full flow, inspect output/{deck-slug}/plan.yaml
Manual: Run /sb:build-one, verify slide uses section context
Manual: Run /sb:plan-one, verify optional discovery offered

ideas.idea: Execute /sb:plan-deck fully, open plan.yaml, verify agenda section exists with all sections
Verify each section in agenda has discovery object with key_message
Check each slide in slides array has agenda_section_id pointing to valid section
Run /sb:build-one after plan-deck, check if visual guidance reflects discovery selections
Verify slide title/content incorporates key_message from section
Read CONVENTIONS.md, verify AskUserQuestion section exists with examples
Run /sb:plan-one, verify optional discovery step appears after confirmation
Skip discovery in plan-one, verify plan.yaml valid without discovery
Complete discovery in plan-one, verify discovery data saved
